channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Forget traditional shipbuilding: Saronic’s new $3.2 billion 'Port Alpha' autonomous navy drone shipyard will be bigger than every 2026 World Cup stadium combined
item.description: $3.2 billion 'Port Alpha' autonomous shipyard will boost drone production in the US.

item.title: Google's Gemini 3.6 Flash model cuts AI agent token costs by up to 65% on long horizon engineering tasks —and 3.5 Pro is on the way
item.description: Google DeepMind today released three new proprietary AI models it says are among its most token-efficient yet: Gemini 3.6 Flash, Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber. The models aim to make AI agents faster, smarter, and cheaper at scale. Google is pricing Gemini 3.6 Flash at $1.50 per one million input tokens and $7.50 per one million output tokens through its application programming interface (API), while Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite costs a staggeringly cheap $0.30/$2.50 per million tokens in/out. Compare that to the $1.50/$9.00 per 1M tokens for Gemini 3.5 Flash, and the $2/$12 for G...

item.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
item.description: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

item.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
item.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.

item.title: Bucking EV slowdown, Sila raises $300M to expand battery materials factory
item.description: Sila's fresh $300 million round will help it make enough of its silicon-carbon anode material to power more than 100,000 EVs.

item.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
item.description: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an estimate of how much text could be AI-generated or written with AI assistance, according to a blog post published on Tuesday. The […]

item.title: Taylor Farms Spent Big on MAGA and Anti-Regulatory Lobbying Before Diarrhea Outbreak
item.description: The company donated more than $3.6 million to conservative groups between 2020 and 2025, including $1 million to the MAGA Inc. super PAC.

item.title: This Former Intel CEO Wants to Jumpstart Moore’s Law With Light
item.description: Pat Gelsinger wants to pave the way to ever more powerful artificial intelligence using tiny beams of light.

item.title: The 8-Hour challenge: SK On says solid-state robot batteries must justify a 4x manufacturing cost jump to replace 'inferior' lithium-ion
item.description: SK On says solid-state batteries can close the gap, but only if the math holds for companies.

item.title: Des poussières tombées sur nos toits révèlent un astéroïde que personne n’a jamais identifié
item.description: Chaque jour, des dizaines de tonnes de poussières extraterrestres tombent sur la Terre. En étudiant un nouveau type de micrométéorites, des chercheurs ont mis en évidence la signature d'un corps parent jusqu'ici inconnu, probablement un astéroïde primitif. Une découverte qui suggère que certains...

item.title: Substack is adding an AI detection feature
item.description: Substack is partnering with Pangram to add an AI detection feature.

item.title: Apple has reportedly fixed its Hide My Email vulnerability
item.description: Apple reportedly fixed the Hide My Email vulnerability that left iCloud+ users' emails not especially hidden.

item.title: Einride bets $38M on EV charging as it scales electric trucking
item.description: The acquisition — Einride's first as a publicly traded company — will expand its EV-charging ecosystem as it works to scale its electric trucking business.

item.title: Playstation Plus is saying goodbye to these games in August 2026
item.description: Dead Island 2, Harold Halibut and seven others will be gone soon.

item.title: We tested dozens of free CarPlay apps, here are the best ones
item.description: After using CarPlay for years and testing dozens of apps, we've narrowed down the list of CarPlay apps you really need.
